data.label: Start: Intro to Accounting
data.description: Understand the accounting equation, assets, liabilities, and equity.

data.label: Bookkeeping & Journal Entries
data.description: Master double-entry bookkeeping, debits, credits, and ledgers.

data.label: The 3 Financial Statements
data.description: Income Statement, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow Statement connections.

data.label: Excel for Finance
data.description: Keyboard shortcuts, formatting, VLOOKUP, INDEX/MATCH, and pivot tables.

data.label: Financial Ratio Analysis
data.description: Profitability, liquidity, solvency, and efficiency metrics.

data.label: Managerial Accounting
data.description: Cost behavior, break-even analysis, and job-order costing.

data.label: Budgeting & Forecasting
data.description: Creating operating budgets, variance analysis, and cash flow projections.

data.label: Corporate Finance Basics
data.description: Capital structure, WACC, and the risk-return tradeoff.

data.label: Time Value of Money (TVM)
data.description: Present value, future value, annuities, and NPV calculations.

data.label: Financial Modeling
data.description: Building a 3-statement model and DCF (Discounted Cash Flow) valuation.

data.label: Tax & Audit Fundamentals
data.description: Corporate taxation basics, internal controls, and the audit cycle.

data.label: Accounting Software & ERP
data.description: Navigating QuickBooks Online, Xero, or basic SAP/Oracle modules.

data.label: Compliance & Reporting
data.description: Understanding GAAP vs. IFRS, month-end close process, and SEC filings.

data.label: Capstone Financial Model
data.description: Analyze a public company, forecast earnings, and present an investment pitch.

data.label: Job Ready: Financial Analyst / Staff Accountant
data.description: Resume tailoring, technical interview prep, and case study practice.
